assertions.assertion: Output contains 'AddBff()' with '.ConfigureOpenIdConnect' replacing the manual AddAuthentication/AddCookie/AddOpenIdConnect setup
assertions.rationale: Shows AddBff().ConfigureOpenIdConnect().ConfigureCookies() and the manual AddAuthentication/AddCookie/AddOpenIdConnect is removed from code
Code block still contains app.MapBffManagementEndpoints() — developer did not know it was auto-registered in V4
Code still uses .RequireAccessToken(TokenType.User) — V3 syntax not updated to V4

assertions.assertion: Output contains '.AddRemoteApis()' since V4 requires it for remote API endpoints
assertions.rationale: AddRemoteApis() does not appear anywhere in the response

assertions.assertion: Output preserves the original OIDC settings (Authority, ClientId, ClientSecret, ResponseType, scopes)
assertions.rationale: Preserves Authority='https://identity.example.com', ClientId='spa', ClientSecret='secret', ResponseType='code', Scope.Add('api1'), SaveTokens=true
